landing.tagline: A bridge back to real connection
landing.title: BondAI — An AI Companion for Deeper Relationships
landing.subtitle: Remember your life. Coach your social skills. Connect with intention.
landing.description: BondAI is an AI companion that remembers your life, coaches social skills, and nudges you toward real-world connection.
landing.feature.memory.title: Remembers Everything
landing.feature.memory.desc: Your AI learns your relationships, values, and goals to offer personalized guidance
landing.feature.coaching.title: Social Skills Coach
landing.feature.coaching.desc: Practice difficult conversations and scenarios with an AI that gives honest feedback
landing.feature.connection.title: Real Connection Nudges
landing.feature.connection.desc: Get reminders and inspiration to take small steps toward meaningful relationships
landing.pricing.title: Simple, Fair Pricing
landing.pricing.tier.free.name: Free
landing.pricing.tier.free.features: Daily check-ins, Basic chat, Limited coaching
landing.pricing.tier.plus.name: Plus
landing.pricing.tier.plus.features: Unlimited chat, Advanced coaching, Connection insights
landing.pricing.tier.pro.name: Pro
landing.pricing.tier.pro.features: Everything in Plus, AI voice conversations, Priority support

onboarding.step1.title: Welcome to BondAI
onboarding.step1.description: Let's set up your profile so your AI can know you better
onboarding.step2.title: Your Relationships
onboarding.step2.description: Tell us about the people who matter most to you
onboarding.step3.title: Your Goals
onboarding.step3.description: What kind of connections do you want to build?
onboarding.step4.title: Your Style
onboarding.step4.description: How do you prefer to communicate and be coached?
onboarding.step5.title: You're Ready

dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.interaction_help: Log a tiny real-world step — coffee, a text, a hello. Small counts.

coaching.title: Coaching Scenarios
coaching.subtitle: Practice real conversations
coaching.description: Practice difficult social situations with your AI coach. Get feedback on what went well and what to improve.
coaching.scenario.difficult_conversation.title: Difficult Conversation
coaching.scenario.difficult_conversation.desc: Practice having a tough talk with someone important
coaching.scenario.friendship.title: Reconnecting with Friends
coaching.scenario.friendship.desc: Learn how to reach out after time apart
coaching.scenario.networking.title: Networking
coaching.scenario.networking.desc: Practice making genuine connections at events
coaching.scenario.boundaries.title: Setting Boundaries
coaching.scenario.vulnerability.title: Being Vulnerable
coaching.scenario.vulnerability.desc: Learn to share more deeply with others

goals.title: Goals
goals.subtitle: Track your connection journey
goals.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this goal?
